data.title: Berkshire Hathaway Q4 Profits Soar 71%, Buffett Says Firm Pays More Taxes Than 'Tech Titans' With Market Value in 'Trillions'
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway Inc.'s annual report was released on Saturday morning, shedding light on the company's robust performance in the insurance sector with a whopping 71% increase in operating earnings for the fourth quarter.

data.title: Mary Trump Slams Uncle: 'Trump and His Corrupt Fascist Regime Are Aligned With the Agenda of Vladimir Putin and Moscow'
data.description: The U.S. government has reportedly issued a diplomatic questionnaire to European leaders. The questionnaire seeks to understand their position on Ukraine's security and their readiness to defend Ukraine without U.S. leadership.
